message:
test: new tests for layout caching, presenter sanitization, batch quit

Layout Cache (layout_cache_ratio.rs):
- Tests ratio constraint canonicalization for cache key equality
- Verifies Ratio(1,2) and Ratio(2,4) produce equivalent cache keys

Presenter Control Chars (presenter_control_chars.rs):
- Tests that control characters (tab, newline, carriage return) are
  sanitized before output to prevent cursor desync
- Ensures terminal output integrity

Batch Quit (batch_quit.rs):
- Tests that Cmd::Batch properly stops executing after Cmd::Quit
- Verifies messages after quit are not processed
- Prevents side effects during shutdown

These tests improve coverage for edge cases discovered during the
bd-2dui coverage audit and code review sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
